prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I cannot provide financial advice or predict future stock prices with certainty, as market conditions are influenced by a multitude of unpredictable factors. These ranges are illustrative and should not be taken as actual financial predictions. Actual price movements may fall outside these intervals.
